description_long: This weathered stone obelisk stands vertically, featuring a rectangular shaft with a rough, aged surface. The front face is adorned with relief carvings depicting two human figures in the upper section and a single figure below, all framed within shallow, rectangular panels. The stone is heavily textured, with visible cracks and erosion, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements. The sides and rear are unadorned, showing only the natural, irregular stone surface. The base is slightly wider and set into a patch of grass, indicating it is likely fixed in place outdoors. The overall appearance is that of a historical or commemorative monument, possibly of Roman or ancient origin.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with relief carvings of human figures on its front, set on a grassy base and showing significant age and erosion.
description_view_0: The front view displays detailed relief carvings of three human figures within rectangular panels, with the stone's rough texture and signs of aging clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the obelisk's thickness and unadorned, rough stone surface, with no carvings or inscriptions present.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a completely plain, weathered stone surface with natural cracks and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the obelisk's narrow profile and rough, uncarved stone, with a small circular mark visible near the center.
attribute_ornamentation: Relief carvings of three human figures on the front face, arranged in two panels; upper panel with two figures, lower panel with one figure. Style is shallow, weathered bas-relief.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple rectangular extension of the shaft, slightly wider than the main body, with no visible decorative features. It is set directly into a patch of grass.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and unadorned, with a rough, weathered finish and no unique features or decorations.
attribute_surrounding_features: A small patch of grass surrounds the base; no other notable features or objects are present.
